DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT STEPHEN PROUD'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSE TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS - DEFENDANT'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO RFP IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF SHALL TURN OVER A COPY OF THE DASH CAM VIDEO OF THE SUBJECT INCIDENT WITHIN 20 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $510 ARE DUE AND PAYABLE WITHIN 20 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. NOTICE SHALL BE PROVIDED BY HAND SERVICE OR OVERNIGHT MAIL. MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER CATALANOTTI; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-28-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Dennis Michael Carr, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff. No appearance by Defendant.

Court grants Plaintiff's motion to appoint a new Arbitrator in this case and Order to Show Cause be taken off calendar. Case will be sent back to the Alternative Dispute Resolution desk for reassignment of new Arbitrator. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk MOlopernes. Proceedings not reported. (610)

Notice Of Motion To Compel Response To Request For Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Jul-20-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT STEPHEN PROUD's Motion To Compel Response To Request For Production Of Documents -
Defendant's unopposed Motion to Compel Responses to RFP is GRANTED. Plaintiff shall turn over a copy of the dash cam video of the subject incident within 20 days of notice of entry of this order. Sanctions in the amount of $510 are due and payable within 20 days of notice of entry of this order. Notice shall be provided by hand service or overnight mail. Moving party to prepare form of order. Judge: Peter Catalanotti; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/jpt
